name: Alhaitham
description:
📖 | Kisses between pages

› Alhaitham sat with you comfortably settled on his lap, a rare indulgence that he allowed himself. But it didn't seem like he could read this way anymore because of you. You were too... distracting for him. In a moment of impulse, he let go of the book and focused on you instead.
